text: I heard like a bunch of bad stuff like gunshots. I went inside the closet with
my whole class. We heard like 12 or like 16 gunshots and then the SWAT team said
if you open up and they opened the door they told us to put our hands up and
form a big line. We were like walking inside the Mosalla. All of us we saw the
Sheikh's apartment inside the mosque and like it was broken down the gold stuff
was broken floor on the floor and then we went did that we went down we went
from the hudud station and then we saw a bunch of bad stuff people laying down
and yeah bad stuff. I felt a bit scared my legs are shaking my hands and my head
was like hurting me a lot. I felt like a rock.
